scenes.title: SPRINGMARC
scenes.narration: This is Springmarc: choose the floor plan, then see the life before the home is built.
scenes.subtitle: PLAN IT BEFORE MOVE-IN.

scenes.title: Unit A1
scenes.narration: Unit A1 is 1 bed / 1 bath, 689 sq ft, starting at $2,040.
scenes.subtitle: Unit A1: STARTING AT $2,040.

scenes.title: Unit B2
scenes.narration: Unit B2 is 2 bed / 2 bath, 988 sq ft, starting at $2,620.
scenes.subtitle: Unit B2: STARTING AT $2,620.

scenes.title: Unit C3
scenes.narration: Unit C3 is 3 bed / 2 bath, 1,250 sq ft, starting at $3,180.
scenes.subtitle: Unit C3: STARTING AT $3,180.

scenes.title: NEST
scenes.narration: In Nest, the low sofa, wood coffee table, and standing desk make everyday life feel planned.
scenes.subtitle: NEST: WORK, REST, RECHARGE.
must_include: crib not present in this room (crib only in bedroom)
rattan pendant or warm floor lamp

scenes.title: DREAM
scenes.narration: Dream keeps the crib, platform bed, and soft textiles calm for a growing family.
scenes.subtitle: DREAM: CALM FAMILY SPACE.

scenes.title: TASTE
scenes.narration: Taste brings matte details, ceramics, and a cutting board into a clean Japandi kitchen.
scenes.subtitle: TASTE: CLEAN JAPANDI DETAIL.
must_include: soft natural task light from dining area

scenes.title: DINE
scenes.narration: Dine centers the round oak table under a rattan pendant, right by the window light.
scenes.subtitle: DINE: OAK, RATTAN, LIGHT.

scenes.title: RELAX
scenes.narration: Relax extends the home outside with low seating, lanterns, and an easy indoor outdoor pause.
scenes.subtitle: RELAX: INDOOR OUTDOOR CALM.

scenes.title: REVIVE
scenes.narration: Revive finishes the tour with matte surfaces, folded towels, and quiet spa texture.
scenes.subtitle: REVIVE: SIMPLE SPA TEXTURE.
must_include: matte finishes and minimal ceramic accessories

scenes.title: HAUS FOR SPRINGMARC
scenes.narration: Haus turns a floor plan into clips, shots, and a real estate reel so buyers can start planning now.
scenes.subtitle: A REEL FROM A FLOOR PLAN.
